name: qa-reporter
description: Portable QA reporting plugin with report_state JSON, QA reports, issue packages, SIT/UAT docs, coverage-risk summaries, optional Plane MCP issue workflows, and Notion source/publishing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build QA reports and sign-off packages.
interface.longDescription: QA Reporter converts planner, executor, manual, exploratory, Plane work item, and Notion-linked inputs into governed report_state JSON, review-ready reports, issue submission packages, SIT/UAT documents, coverage-risk summaries, sign-off recommendations, optional Plane MCP submission/state discovery, Notion source reading, Notion publishing, and Plane summary comments with Notion links.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-reporter to generate a QA report package from execution results or issue findings.
